stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are taking-off with a single-engined aeroplane, and a field-length-limited take-off mass, from runway 27, in VMC, for a straight-out departure. Given the following information, what will be the expected obstacle clearance over the Tower on the extended centre line?

Climb gradient: 8%
TAS: 111 kt
Wind component: 4 kt tailwind
1 NM = 6080 ft
Height Difference = ((GD x TAS)/GS) x Gradient/100
